title: tragacantha keyserlingii
intro: Tragacantha keyserlingii, also known as the Keyserling's beardstongue, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, as it contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha keyserlingii include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha keyserlingii are typically made from the leaves and flowers of the plant, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
